name: Parisian Sophisticates/1953 Winner
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream together the eggs, butter, and sugar until very creamy and light.
3. Add buttermilk (or sour milk), almond extract, and vanilla extract to the egg mixture. Beat well.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, beating until smooth with a hand mixer or electric mixer.
5. Divide the batter evenly among greased muffin cups or lined paper liners.
6. Bake in a preheated 375°F (190°C) oven for 20-25 minutes.
7. Remove from pans and allow to cool completely.
8. Cut a cone from the center of each cupcake, leaving enough sides to support the structure.
9. Fill the cones with truffle filling.
10. Crumble the removed cones and toast in a broiler until golden brown.
11. Sprinkle over the cupcakes.
12. Truffle Filling: Heat 3 tablespoons sugar and 2 squares (about 1 oz) baking chocolate until melted. Allow to cool slightly.
13. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
14. Blend in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
15. Beat 3 egg whites until soft peaks form.
16. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the whites until stiff peaks form.
17. Gently fold in the cooled chocolate mixture into the whipped egg whites until fully incorporated.
